title: Veggie Wrap
description: A simple and healthy wrap filled with sautéed vegetables.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add sliced bell peppers and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add sliced green pepper and cook for another 2-3 minutes.
Warm the tortilla wrap in the microwave for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the wrap by placing the cooked vegetables on half of the wrap.
Fold the wrap in half to enclose the filling.
